# datahub_assertion_assignment_rules (Data Source)

**DataHub ❌ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub Cloud assertion assignment rules visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by `listAssertionAssignmentRules` (OpenSearch). Rules created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Requires DataHub Cloud; errors on OSS DataHub.

Feed the `urns` output into an `import {}` for-each block to bulk-import existing rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_assertion_assignment_rules" "all" {}

output "assignment_rule_urns" {
  description = "URNs of all DataHub Cloud assertion assignment rules."
  value       = data.datahub_assertion_assignment_rules.all.urns
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of assignment rule URNs (e.g. `["urn:li:assertionAssignmentRule:<id>"]`).
